name: grid
title: Status Grid Table
description: Tabular status widget: a scrollable Monitor / Traffic / Interface / Status table with a sticky header, hairline row dividers and a hover wash. Each row leads with a coloured status dot and ends with an up/down state chip, all derived from a deterministic seed by the pure OOW.grid renderer; the mount itself is the scroll container so the table scrolls independently of the widget body. Rows are keyboard-focusable for drill-down (base focus ring); an aria-disabled grid dims the whole table for no-data / loading.
